entry.title: rman-log-check
entry.content:
slug: first-production-hotfix title: RMAN backup failure and logs check authors: [VikasPadmashali123] tags: [Rman, backup, logs]​

###This post has details of RMAN backup status and logs

Check RMAN backup status and rman backup logs:

STEP 1: To find the status of the jobs:

set lines 300 col STATUS format a22 col hrs format 999.99 select SESSION_KEY, SESSION_RECID, SESSION_STAMP,INPUT_TYPE, STATUS, to_char(START_TIME,'mm/dd/yy hh24:mi') start_time, to_char(END_TIME,'mm/dd/yy hh24:mi') end_time, elapsed_seconds/3600 hrs from V$RMAN_BACKUP_JOB_DETAILS where status='RUNNING' order by session_key;

STEP 2: Check the logs or output of the running RMAN jobs set lines 200 set pages 1000 select output from GV$RMAN_OUTPUT where session_recid = &SESSION_RECID and session_stamp = &SESSION_STAMP order by recid;
